_help: Global Configuration for Network Data Extractor. Note: JSON does not support standard comments, so '_help' variables are used for documentation and ignored by the script.

extractor._help_extractor: Main orchestrator execution settings. Controls the concurrency and output destinations.

ssh._help_ssh: Tuning parameters for the paramiko SSH connection backend. Increase timeout if devices are slow.

topology._help_topology: Core variables that instruct the Regex engine on how to generate the topology map (interface2connection.py).
topology._help_ignore_virtual: Prefixes of virtual or uninteresting interfaces that will be completely ignored during topology creation.
topology._help_neighbor_regex: Prefixes in interface descriptions that trigger the script to look for a neighbor's hostname.
topology._help_device_name: Prefixes defining the hostnames of your core hardware models. Only descriptions containing these will be considered valid topology endpoints.
topology._help_speed_colors: Mapping from Interface Bandwidth (in bits per second) to Hex color codes and widths for the final topology visualization.

discovery._help_discovery: Filters out expected/known prefixes of client/external equipment when the Topology Checker hunts for undocumented neighbor devices.
